# ferriskey_openid_configuration (Data Source)

Reads the public OIDC discovery document (`.well-known/openid-configuration`) for a realm.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ferriskey_openid_configuration" "master" {
  realm = "master"
}

output "token_endpoint" {
  value = data.ferriskey_openid_configuration.master.token_endpoint
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `realm` (String) Realm whose discovery document is read.

### Read-Only

- `authorization_endpoint` (String) Authorization endpoint URL.
- `end_session_endpoint` (String) End-session (logout) endpoint URL.
- `grant_types_supported` (List of String) Supported OAuth2 grant types.
- `introspection_endpoint` (String) Token introspection endpoint URL.
- `issuer` (String) OIDC issuer identifier.
- `jwks_uri` (String) JSON Web Key Set URL.
- `revocation_endpoint` (String) Token revocation endpoint URL.
- `token_endpoint` (String) Token endpoint URL.
- `token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported` (List of String) Supported token endpoint authentication methods.
- `userinfo_endpoint` (String) UserInfo endpoint URL.
